name: pixel canvas
description: A lightweight React canvas for creating pixel-art drawings — simple tools, instant feedback, built for quick creative sketching sessions.

name: MazeLike
description: An interactive maze built in React, where the goal is simple: navigate from start to end using logic and movement.

name: ridiculous
description: A playful collection of visual experiments and interesting art pieces, built to explore creative coding without a fixed goal.

name: PhotoCards
description: A camera-based tool that lets you capture photos and turn them into custom photocards or greeting cards, instantly shareable.

name: Basic algo games
description: Everyday algorithms turned into small interactive games — a hands-on way to practice and actually understand core logic concepts.
tech: just a hands on practise on different algorithms

name: Digit_Recognisation
description: Using TensorFlow and Scikit-Learn, this project builds, trains, and compares CNN and SVM models for handwritten digit recognition tasks.

name: Doodle Generator
description: A mobile app generating random doodle prompts using Gemini AI, automatically storing your sketches and ideas straight into Google Drive.
tech: react native js, gemini flash 2.5, api for google drive for storage

name: Portfolio Website
description: A hybrid dev + design portfolio, hand-built from scratch — showcasing full-stack projects, UI/UX work, and everything in between.

name: FASTER Poster
description: A bold typographic poster set against a blurred subway train, using motion and grit to convey urgency and speed.

name: Amora Mobile — Volunteer Form
description: A mobile volunteer sign-up screen for a fictional art museum, blending soft tones with elegant serif typography.

name: RODEO Payment UI
description: A dark-themed checkout card interface with clean input fields, designed for a smooth and trustworthy payment experience.

name: 404 Error — Summer Camp
description: A playful 404 page using a summer camp theme, guiding lost visitors back with charming illustration and signage.

name: Doodle Diary — Upload Screen
description: A hand-drawn, playful upload interface for a doodle-saving app, mixing sketchy typography with a friendly cloud icon.

name: Folks — Landing Page
description: A full landing page for a team-matching platform, featuring a bold hero, feature highlights, and an FAQ section.

name: Lemon Orchard — Picnic Pass
description: A bright, illustrated event pass design pairing hand-lettered type with a fresh citrus motif and scannable QR code.

name: Aam Ki Party — Invite Card
description: A vibrant, culturally rooted event invite card, combining warm illustration with festive typography and a QR pass.

name: App Icon — Gradient Figure
description: A minimal app icon built from a gradient figure mark, designed for clarity and instant recognition at small sizes.

name: Kroken Bar & Bistro — Menu
description: An elegant restaurant menu design for a Norwegian bistro, pairing script typography with a rich, moody floral background.

name: Popcorn Night — Icon Illustration
description: A playful isometric popcorn illustration designed as a coupon or event icon, full of texture and dimensional detail.

name: Amora Desktop — Volunteer Form
description: A desktop volunteer application layout for a fictional art museum, pairing a painterly backdrop with a clean sign-up form.

name: Sleep Tracker — App Icon
description: A cozy, expressive app icon for a sleep tracking app, using a sleepy cloud character to communicate calm instantly.

name: Lobby — Verification Screen
description: A dark-mode verification success screen for a members app, using a leaf mark and clear status messaging.

name: VOILA Summer — Poster
description: A whimsical summer-themed poster bursting with color, hand-drawn characters, and playful citrus and pool imagery.

name: Watermelon Fest — Party Card
description: A fun, character-driven event card for a watermelon festival, paired with a QR-coded access pass on the right.

name: Mango Masti — Frooti Concept
description: A vibrant, character-driven illustration turning a mango into a playful brand mascot for Frooti.

name: FEEL — Halftone Editorial Poster
description: A striking pop-art portrait featuring an edgy halftone dot matrix pattern paired with brutalist typography.

name: Marathon Landing Page
description: A clean commercial banner layout showcasing menu offerings with high-contrast text and warm accent graphics.

name: Urban Style — Fashion Banner
description: A minimal, modern streetwear promotional hero block mixing bold photography with clean layouts.
